Advanced formatting options

Use these codes inside your titles:
  • example = example
  • *example* = example
  • **example** = example (It will use your website main color)
  • _example_ = example
  • __example__ = example
  • ___example___ = example
Notes: You can use up to 5 different formats on one word.

      Design Now

      Website Type

      Suitable for small websites. All of your content is on one scrollable page. This website type has a menu that, when clicked, scrolls to the relevant section.
      Suitable for businesses that want to convert website visitors into customers or leads
      Suitable for stores and large websites. A website with separate pages and a full menu.

      Search Engine Optimization (SEO)

      Ads Manager

      How to get the Google AdSense code:
      For new AdSense accounts the ads won't be displayed immediately. A blank space will be shown until your account is fully approved by Google, which can take up to 24 hours.
      Homepage Ads Status
      ON - To disable showing ads on the homepage, remove the Adsense promo from the "PAGES" tab.
      Off - Add the AdSense promo from the 'PAGES' tab to enable the ads to be shown on the homepage.
      Active ads inside pages?
      Medium - Top of the page
      Adsense ads will be displayed 70% of the time, and system-generated ads 30% of the time. For 100% coverage, please upgrade your site to one of our premium plans. Upgrade

      App Settings

      Important Notes:
      • Android - Chrome browser - Video
      • iOS - Safari browser - Video
      • Mac/Windows – Chrome browser (lets you install a desktop app on your computer) - Video
      • Also, new features for existing devices are launched regularly, and we will do our best to support them as soon as they are released.
